characterized as mandatory eligibility groups by Subsection 1902(a)(10)(A)(i) of the Social 
Security Act (SSA) despite the U.S. Supreme Court ruling (National Federation of Independent Business 
v. Sebelius, 567 U.S. 519 [2012]) which ruled that states could not be required to offer such coverage. 
Therefore, some states may not report any of the Medicaid expansion groups to T-MSIS if these 
groups are not applicable to a particular state.
